name: Bardock
description: The biological father of Raditz and Son Goku, Burdock is a Saiyan who is given the gift of precognition. In several of his recurring visions, he witnesses the destruction of his home planet Vegeta by the hand of Freeza. After escaping certain death from Dodoria, he tries desperately to change his planet's grim future by attempting to combat Freeza and his legion of men head on. ~!He ultimately fails on ceasing Freeza's attack on the planet and is killed in the process. name: Chiho Sasaki
description: Chiho is Maou's friend and a fellow employee at MgRonald's. She has a crush on Maou. She can hear and understand the language of Ente Isla, after receiving feedback from a hypnosis spell that Maou cast on her father, Inspector Sasaki. She has a strong will and a polite, friendly, pleasant all around personality. She is head over heels for Maou, and sometimes gets jealous when she sees Emi and Maou together. nativeName: リーゼロッテ・シャルロック
description: Lieselotte is a beautiful young lady, who has flowing, long blonde hair that is tied up in twin tail. She has purple eyes compared to her sister who has blue eyes. description: __Birth Place:__ Tokyo __Height:__ 164 cm The lead character designer of Eagle Jump. name: Tyki Mikk
description: __Height:__ 188 cm (6'2") Tyki lives a double life: his "white side" that is a carefree and goofy man of Portuguese descent who travels with humans that love to play poker, and his sadistic "dark side" that has a lust for blood and takes up his role as Noah's descendant (and therefore, one of the antagonists). name: Kurome
description: Kurome is a member of the Jaegers, and the younger sister of Akame. Like her sister, she has a big appetite and is often seen eating, usually candy. She stubbornly refuses to share her candy with even her comrades. Kurome wields an offensive Teigu like her sister, in the form of a sword named "March of the Dead: Yatsuhusa", which allows her to enslave up to 8 enemies killed with the Teigu. name: Souya Kawata
description: __Height:__ 170cm Vice captain of the Fourth Division of the Tokyo Manji Gang. He's the younger twin brother of [Nahoya Kawata](https://anilist.co/character/168679/Nahoya-Kawata).

name: Aki Shino
description: Aki has an unfussy and motherly temper while also known to have a caring nature too. She's also a very talented artist. name: Aoi Asahina
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") __Talent:__ Swimming Aoi is a student in Hope's Peak Academy's Class 78th, and a participant of the Killing School Life. She is the Super High School Level Swimmer (超高校級のスイマー), or Ultimate Swimming Pro in the English localization. Always energetic and friendly, Asahina is also a bit airheaded. name: Uruka Takemoto
description: Uruka is a genius when it comes to sports, having earned several titles in freestyle swimming, but her lazy nature and hatred for studying has made her terrible with her other academics.

name: Haruka Hashida
description: A second year high school student and attends the same school as Yotasuke. Also goes to the same cram school as Yatora. Hashida applied to Geidai not because he wanted to actually get in but because he enjoys looking at other people's art. He often goes to art exhibitions and displays because he loves seeing people's art a lot (it's like a fetish). Has three sisters, two being older and one being younger.

name: Ferid Bathory
nativeName: フェリド・バートリー
description: He is a seventh progenitor among the vampires. He is the one who killed Yuuichirou's family, thus fueling his desire for revenge against all vampires. On the outside, Ferid acts kind and polite. However, he keeps many secrets which he has ready to deploy, and tells equally as many lies, similarly to use as and when they are best served. name: Hisanobu Takahashi
description: At the start of the manga, Takahashi is a typical high school alpha male-- captain of the basketball team, popular with girls, effortlessly smart, and a bully to other "inferior" students. In an effort to give his girlfriend a ride home after school, he steals a bicycle, is chased into traffic, and is hit by a garbage truck, rendering him paralyzed from the chest down. name: Xiu Ye
description: He is well-known by players as a textbook expert and the God of Fighting. Ye Xiu is one of the first batch of players and a first-generation Glory player. He is also known to be skilled at all professions, having developed combo guides, created techniques like 'Delivery Gun' and various other popular types of playstyles in Glory. Former captain of team "Excellent Era" who obtained 3 consecutive championships during the first 3 season of the Glory Pro League.
